typeProperties.script:
parameters{
	hasErrored as boolean (),
	WcfErrorMsg as string ()
}

source(output(
		Date as date,
		SubCategoryId as integer,
		CurveId as integer,
		MDCurveId as long,
		ClientAgentId as integer,
		ClientId as integer,
		ClientLocationId as integer,
		UserId as integer,
		Description as string,
		MDVersionId as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
	query: 'SELECT DISTINCT SubCategoryId, Date, ClientAgentId, ClientId, ClientLocationId, UserId, Description, NULL AS \'CurveId\', NULL AS \'MDCurveId\', NULL AS \'MDVersionId\' FROM [Staging].[UserDefinedCurveTransform] WHERE [Status]=\'Transformed\'  AND Error IS NULL ORDER BY SubCategoryId, Date',
	format: 'query',
	staged:false) ~> UserDefinedCurveTransform
UserDefinedCurveTransform sort(asc(SubCategoryId, false),asc(Date, false),asc(CurveId, false),asc(MDCurveId, false),asc(ClientAgentId, false),asc(ClientId, false),asc(ClientLocationId, false),asc(UserId, false),asc(Description, false),asc(MDVersionId, false)) ~> Aggregate
Aggregate window(over(SubCategoryId,
		Date,
		CurveId,
		MDCurveId,
		ClientAgentId,
		ClientId,
		ClientLocationId,
		UserId,
		Description,
		MDVersionId),
	asc(SubCategoryId, true),
	asc(Date, true),
	asc(CurveId, true),
	asc(MDCurveId, true),
	asc(ClientAgentId, true),
	asc(ClientId, true),
	asc(ClientLocationId, true),
	asc(UserId, true),
	asc(Description, true),
	asc(MDVersionId, true),
	Rank_col = rowNumber()) ~> Aggregatedistinct
Aggregatedistinct filter(Rank_col == 1) ~> AggregatedistinctFilterComponent
AggregatedistinctFilterComponent sink(input(
		{} as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> GetMDCurveId
AggregatedistinctFilterComponent split(isNull(MDCurveId), disjoint: true) ~> SplitonNullMDCurveId@(NullMDCurveId,NotNullMDCurveId)
SplitonNullMDCurveId@SplitonNullMDCurveIdTOSplitonNullMDCurveIdREFORMATDATATYPEDIFFLINK derive({} = toLong({})) ~> SplitonNullMDCurveIdREFORMATDATATYPEDIFF
SplitonNullMDCurveId@OLEDBCommandOutput,SplitonNullMDCurveIdREFORMATDATATYPEDIFF union(byName: true) ~> UnionAll
UnionAll sink(input(
		{} as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> GetMDVersionId
UnionAll split(isNull(MDVersionId), disjoint: true) ~> SplitonNUllVersionId@(NullVersionId,NotNullVersionId)
SplitonNullMDCurveId@NullMDCurveId sink(input(
		{} as integer
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> AddNewCurveToMD
SplitonNUllVersionId@NullVersionId sink(input(
		{} as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> CreateNewVersionInMD
SplitonNUllVersionId@OLEDBCommandOutput,SplitonNUllVersionId@NotNullVersionId union(byName: true) ~> UnionAll2
UnionAll2 split(!(isNull(MDCurveId)) && !(isNull(MDVersionId)), disjoint: true) ~> SplitonNULLids@(FoundCurves,Default)
SplitonNULLids@FoundCurves sink(input(
		{} as long
	),
	allowSchemaDrift: true,
	validateSchema: false,
	stagingSchemaName: 'dbo',
	saveOrder: 10000,
	insertable:true,
	deletable:false,
	upsertable:false,
	updateable:false,
	keys:[],
	mapColumn(
		{} = Param_0)) ~> UpdateStagingMDCurveId
